items.title: 100-days-of-ai
items.summary: Take the 100 Days of AI challenge - learn one AI concept a day, from machine learning basics to AI agents in production, in 100 days.
items.summary_cn: 参加100天的人工智能挑战-在100天内每天学习一个人工智能概念，从机器学习基础知识到生产中的人工智能代理。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Zer0Fit
items.summary: Zero-shot forecasting, tabular classification, and regression via MCP — exposes Google TimesFM 2.5 and TabFM v1.0.0 to AI assistants. Just attach a CSV and describe what you want to predict.
items.summary_cn: 零点预测、表格分类和通过MCP进行回归—将Google TimesFM 2.5和TabFM v1.0.0暴露给AI助手。只需附上CSV文件并描述您想要预测的内容。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Deep Interaction: An Efficient Human-AI Interaction Method for Large Reasoning Models
items.title_cn: 深度交互：大型推理模型的高效人机交互方法
items.summary: The emergence of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly enhanced the ability of large language models (LLMs) to tackle complex, multi-step tasks. However, when errors occur, current interaction approaches typically involve re-generating another response that may make mistakes again, or u...
items.summary_cn: 思维链（ CoT ）推理的出现大大增强了大型语言模型（ LLM ）处理复杂多步骤任务的能力。但是，当发生错误时，当前的交互方法通常涉及重新生成另一个可能再次出错的回复，或者...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Earthquaker-AI: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework with Rubric-Based Assessment for Primary School Earthquake Education
items.title_cn: Earthquaker-AI ：基于评分的小学地震教育检索增强生成框架
items.summary: This paper presents Earthquaker-AI, a hybrid educational framework building upon a previously implemented educational robotics project by integrating a conversational AI assistant based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation. It aims to enhance earthquake preparedness and conscious action among primary-s...
items.summary_cn: 本文介绍了Earthquaker-AI ，这是一种基于先前实施的教育机器人项目的混合教育框架，通过集成基于Retrieval-Augmented Generation的会话AI助手。它的目的是加强初级教育机构的地震防备和有意识的行动。...
items.comment: 法规来了，短期阵痛难免，长期看是行业走向成熟的必经之路。

items.title: AI-accelerated End-to-End Framework for Rapid Professional Upskilling
items.title_cn: 人工智能加速的端到端框架，快速提升专业技能
items.summary: By 2030, 59 of every 100 workers will need reskilling or upskilling, yet the average time to close an enterprise skills gap grew from roughly 3 days in 2014 to 36 days in 2018. Most current frameworks accelerate single stages of upskilling programs and generally lack industry validation. We present ...
items.summary_cn: 到2030年，每100名工人中将有59人需要再培训或提升技能，但缩小企业技能差距的平均时间从2014年的约3天增加到2018年的36天。大多数当前的框架加速了技能提升计划的单一阶段，并且通常缺乏行业验证。我们介绍...
items.comment: 商业化产品发布，先看定价策略，再决定要不要入坑。

items.title: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
items.title_cn: Lululemon支持尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica $ 3000万A轮融资
items.summary: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.
items.summary_cn: Syntetica是一家法国初创公司，开发了一种回收尼龙的新方法，已经获得了大牌合作伙伴和投资者。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
items.title_cn: 应用计算希望为石油和天然气运营商提供整个工厂的人工智能模型
items.summary: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
items.summary_cn: 应用计算公司已经筹集了2000万美元的A轮融资，为石油、天然气和石化行业建立一个基础人工智能模型。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
items.title_cn: 当Greylock表示本可以筹集更多资金时，为什么将其新基金上限定为15亿$
items.summary: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.
items.summary_cn: 通过将每个基金的投资数量保持在25个左右， Greylock的目标是保持其创始人所谓的“最重要的合作伙伴”。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
